_**Agent (auto-high)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
 The issue is that Hugo's Tailwind compilation only triggers on CSS changes, but the watch script runs the theme generator and then starts the Hugo server without ensuring Tailwind gets rebuilt when other files that affect styling change. The watch command needs to explicitly handle Tailwind recompilation separately from Hugo's CSS pipeline. The real issue is that when Hugo uses `inlineImports: true` with Tailwind, it can't detect changes to imported CSS files, so the watcher doesn't trigger rebuilds. The standard workaround is to either disable `inlineImports` and let Hugo handle the resolution, or explicitly configure Hugo to watch the CSS directory as a dependency. Let me check the Hugo config to see what's currently set up.</details></think>

_**Agent (auto-high)**_
